Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface IResult

All Known Subinterfaces:
IParseResult, ITypeCheckResult, IUpgradeResult<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractResult, LegibilityResult, ParseResult, TypeCheckResult, UpgradeResult
public interface IResult
Common protocol for reporting results of AST operations.

Every operation that can produce error messages, returns an instance of this interface that collects the result status of the operation. This object can then be queried using the methods defined in this interface.

This interface is not intended to be implemented by clients.

Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ASTProblem>
    getProblems()
    Returns a list of all the problems encountered during the operation.
    boolean
    hasProblem()
    Returns whether a problem was encountered during the operation.
    boolean
    isSuccess()
    Returns whether this result is a success, i.e., doesn't contain any error problem.

  • Method Details

    • hasProblem

      boolean hasProblem()
      Returns whether a problem was encountered during the operation. This is a short-hand, fully equivalent to !getProblems().isEmpty().
      Returns:
      whether a problem occurred

    • getProblems

      List<ASTProblem> getProblems()
      Returns a list of all the problems encountered during the operation.
      Returns:
      a list of all problems

    • isSuccess

      boolean isSuccess()
      Returns whether this result is a success, i.e., doesn't contain any error problem. Consequently, a result that contains only warnings is considered as successful.

      Clients who need to know that no problem at all was encountered (including warnings), should rather use hasProblem().

      Returns:
      true iff the operation succeeded
      See Also:
      • hasProblem()
